flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Clovis Community College fell 76% between 2006 and 2009 (12.1% → 3.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Clovis Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Clovis Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.4k → $1.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Clovis Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.3k).
